title: How Small Teams Build a Reliable Podcast Production Pipeline
alternate_titles: Why Podcast Production Breaks Even When the Recording Is Great
From Raw Recording to Publish: The Systems Behind a Great Podcast
description_short: Maya Chen joins us to unpack how small teams can design a reliable podcast production pipeline—from capture to distribution—without drowning in tools.
description_long: Consultant Maya Chen joins the show to break down what a reliable podcast production pipeline actually looks like for a small team. We walk through the five stages of production—capture, post-production, content extraction, review and approval, and distribution—and talk about why the pipeline is part of the product. Maya explains why raw transcripts make great inputs but are never the final editorial truth, how to standardize an episode output bundle, and where automation can accelerate your workflow without giving up human judgment. We close with a practical checklist you can use this month to tighten your own pipeline.

sponsor.name: SoundLayer
sponsor.description: SoundLayer is a collaboration tool for small media teams that helps organize transcripts, asset versions, and review workflows.

chapters.title: Why your production pipeline is part of the product

highlights.speaker: Maya Chen
highlights.text: The pipeline is the product. A polished show is really the result of reliable handoffs, not heroic last-minute fixes.

highlights.speaker: Maya Chen
highlights.text: A transcript is a rich input, not the final source of editorial truth.
Maya breaks production down into five stages—capture, post-production, content extraction, review, and distribution—and explains how standardizing outputs makes downstream work easier.
We talk about separating raw and cleaned transcripts so that automation and teammates aren’t forced to build on top of noisy source material.

call_to_action: If this episode was useful, send it to the teammate who owns editing, publishing, or content ops, and start by tightening your pipeline for the next episode.
